reviews.review_title: Leaving review to score a bribe
reviews.review_description:
I'm writing this review. You know, I haven't played much of the game because on the many screening promises you special pistols.If you leave so.  Just being honest.  I'm here for the pistol. 

That being said from what I can tell from a couple of rounds that I have played the game, i i'm gonna guess it's half decent.  The mix reality is done well enough. Just turns sections of your walls into boarded up holes that quickly get knocked down by generic zombies.   Kind of resembles, Call of Duty.Zombies mode minus the cool power ups, and you can't seem to be able to rebuild.  The barricades back up.  I could be wrong on that like I said , haven't played that much.  I remember what I disliked the most was the zombies look very similar, make the same sounds, and are poorly animated.  

3 stars, but loses another for bribing for a review.   I understand the strategy I don't mind being proud for a review honestly.  I just hate it when it's the first thing you see when you launch the game.

This game is fine. Me and one of my friends got it was very entertaining and surprisingly well-made for what I thought it was gonna be. But it lacks in some content and is not as active as I think it should be. I do recommend it for only eight dollars, but I wish there was more ￼￼￼
Simple but fun!  The mixed reality PvP is on point.  Don't need a lot of space to play it.  I would definitely recommend this to a friend

Trapped in a mall, surrounded by Zombies you not only have to survive the zombies, but also another player who is attempting to take you out as well.  Very fun, very cool and throws in a few jump scares to keep you on your toes. 

I would live to see this updated to where up to 4 people can play against each other as it is now, OR when the zombies break into your space, you are able to exit your room and run around the mall to stay alive.

I've only played the solo game, and it seems to need more work. If the zombie gets inside your room, you can be shooting it just inches away and the bullet misses them and they are not hurt at all.
i love this game! Its my new favorite game.

The game is abandoned; it's been over 9 months since the last update, and the developers are already working on another game without having finished this one. They promised a progression mode that never came to fruition. It definitely has the content of a free-to-play game: a square room that appears on zombies, nothing more than that. 

If they deliver on what they promised, maybe I'll adjust my rating.
Great game but really needs multi-room

Ive played a lot of vr games at this point and was curious to try this one, however it has so many issues, when I started the game the "Attention" screen would never go away unless I completely rescanned my room, hiding behind objects is a cool idea but in my expierence the enemy can still shoot you through them, and gameplay just feels very jank, I cant recommend this game
The game is great for what it is. Could be better as far as the weapons go but still a great game.
If you like to be up on latest AR games, this is best shooter zombie combo yet!🤙
Best mix reality in vr

So I know this is released into early access a while ago, but I am pretty nervous about how bare bones it is. There is still no progression system. At the end of my tutorial the zombies didn't attack me, so I had to quit. Solo mode is a boring endless wave shooter I saw no new weapons available, and these zombies took so many ax hits to die. 
Also, there should be better dismemberment heads splitting in two for an ax and sound when zombies get hit. The blood effect is cool though. 

Overall considering this has already been out in early access for a while I am let down. Refunding. 

Also a thought they should make a co-op and solo mode where you fight an survivor across the street. 

Are they even working on this anymore?
It's a good game for anyone that's into mixed reality games

I always enjoy trying multiplayer games with my friends. This one is unfortunately too broken to be worth even checking out. 
Players can just hide behind furniture and make it impossible to shoot them.

reviews.review_title: I really like this game, BUT...
reviews.review_description:
The Last Stand is fun and engaging, but solo mode needs fixes.  
There should be a clear round indicator in solo mode so you know when it’s safe to reload and restock in peace. Shotguns, grenades, a minigun, and health pills should be available to buy on the tablet, if not, maybe drop some health pills once in a while through the ceiling hatch, througout the round. Killing zombies should earn more money. Please leave out the Big Poppa zombies — they’re way too strong and not fair in solo mode. The cash register that does nothing is frustrating, and the code with a key on the wall feels pointless since only the red button works. Despite these quirks, I really enjoy the game — it has a strong foundation and could be even better with these fixes.  

See ya on the flipside!

reviews.review_title: Unique But Weak Sauce Effort by Dev
reviews.review_description: Seems to be abandoned in early access hell; game was released back in Nov 2024 and last updated was in March 2025! I can't find any players in quick play even though I waited 30 minutes, I think the player base is dead. Solo gets boring fast, there is no vs. AI, you can't buy heals, the zombies eventually become damage sponges and one-hit wonderboys. "Play as You Wait" feature is buggy, it returns you to main menu or sometimes doesn't even work. Melee weapons are half-hearted, the hammer is useless, the knife has poor reach, the hatchet is ok and the bat is the best. If you lie flat on the ground, the zombies can't hurt you. Guns are also meh, two handguns, a revolver, an Uzi, a M4 and a rifle, that's it; there is no shotgun or red dots. Unlike in Home Invasion, no waist holsters  and no breaks in between waves for solo mode, and only one zombie type that bum rushes you.
thanks for making the game free

Last several months I cannot play, cannot recognize room. I rescan room 10 times, also tried different room. I normally play many MR games / zombie shooters in mixed reality with no problems. This is only game which cannot recognize room. I allowed all permissions, tried reinstall, upgrade Quest software, nothing helps. What to do?

I purchased this a while ago, now it's asking for £3.99 gift?
Anyway, my spatial data is switched on in privacy settings.
Starting this game it tells me to allow spatial data or quit.... When it's already turned on. Am I missing something, all other games work fine.
Pleased help or can I get a refund.
Merry Christmas.

This game is amazing I recently came back to it and noticed things I didn’t before. This game has a subtle learning curve. The most amazing thing I noticed is the fact the smg on here has recoil control. You have to adjust your arms down during rapid fire to keep it steady. When you rapid fire your pistol the bullets have more of a spread and less accuracy. If you count your shots in your head your reload is that much fluent and faster. Melee weapons deal great damage to heavier targets but it’s a risk of them hitting you. The guns don’t disappear when you drop them on the ground which is amazing because you’ll find yourself picking up and swamping between everything around you looking for a way to survive longer. This game has so many small ways of really challenging you to survive as if this is a real zombie apocalypse. Before playing I thought I could easily deal with these type of zombies but man this game humbles all of that. You panic, you get scared, and you make mistakes. On here you can try again but if it was real R.I.P.
